parameters.name: list_accounts
parameters.description: List all bank accounts in your KontoFlux workspace with balances and IBANs. No parameters needed.

parameters.name: get_transactions
parameters.description: Get bank transactions with optional filters. Parameters: account_id (numeric ID from list_accounts e.g. 24071508, or empty string for all accounts), category (category name from list_categories or empty string for all), after (start date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string for no filter), before (end date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string for no filter), limit (max results 1-250 or empty string for default 20)

value.account_id: ={{ $fromAI('account_id', 'Account ID or empty string for all accounts', 'string') }}
value.category: ={{ $fromAI('category', 'Category name filter or empty string for all', 'string') }}

schema.description: Numeric account ID from list_accounts or empty string
Category name filter or empty string
Start date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string
End date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string

parameters.name: search_transactions
parameters.description: Full-text search across all transactions. Parameters: query (search text, required), after (date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string), before (date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string), limit (max results 1-250 or empty string for 20)

schema.description: Start date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string
End date YYYY-MM-DD or empty string

parameters.name: list_categories
parameters.description: List all AI-generated transaction categories with subcategories. No parameters needed.

parameters.name: check_scope
parameters.description: Check API key permissions and access scope. No parameters needed.
